title: The Fairies of Green Bit
description: Pages 0–4 focus on the fairies of green bit, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3 as robin and Usopp encounter the Tontatta people while Law’s meeting with Doflamingo and Fujitora becomes increasingly dangerous.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Damn... I haven't changed one bit...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Outta the way! Outta the way!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Haha... you're the one that's changed...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: A Haki FAR BEYOND ANYTHING I COULD EVER HOPE TO ATTAIN...AND...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: even going as far as to cheer me on...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Heh, my pride is in tatters now....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Time until drop point is reached, 45 minutes.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: This iron bridge is totally useless!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Are the fighting fish...really a fish...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: How is that even remotely similar to a fish!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That is the very definition of a sea monster!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's alright, I'm sure you guys will figure something out...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Nah, I can't fight right now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: They're coordinating their attacks!! We're gonna get sandwitched in!!

summary: Pages 0–4 focus on the fairies of green bit, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
